eventsUrl.description: Clawmagotchi events endpoint, usually a Supabase functions URL ending in /events. Defaults to CLAWMAGOTCHI_EVENTS_URL when unset in plugin config.

connectionToken.description: Scoped bearer token minted by the Clawmagotchi app's Connect OpenClaw flow. Defaults to CLAWMAGOTCHI_CONNECTION_TOKEN when unset in plugin config.

detailLevel.description: How much safe metadata to include with events. `medium` is the default and recommended balance.

workspaceId.description: Optional workspace id to include in emitted events. Defaults to the active OpenClaw workspace folder name when available.

petId.description: Optional pet id override. Defaults to "default".

userId.description: Optional user id override. Usually unnecessary because the connection token resolves the user server-side.

retryCount.description: Retry count for transient delivery failures.

maxQueueSize.description: Maximum in-memory event queue size before new events are dropped.

includeGitMetadata.description: Opt-in to include lightweight git metadata such as repo, branch, and changed file count on completion events. Defaults to false.

flushOnShutdown.description: Attempt to flush queued events before the OpenClaw process exits. Defaults to true.

shutdownFlushTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for queued events to flush during shutdown before the process exits.
